title: 👤 Personal Service
lead: Personal service is provided by SAC operators in situations requiring immediate contact.

ura.title: IVR Calls
ura.text: Customers who call through IVRs (Interactive Voice Response) and are directed to SAC.

interfone.title: Parking Intercom
interfone.text: Customers who use the intercom for support during their stay in the parking lot.

estacionamento.title: Direct Support
estacionamento.text: Direct support situations during the customer's stay in the parking lot.

focus.title: Operator Focus
focus.item4: Immediate forwarding according to the type of occurrence

examples.title: Forwarding Examples
examples.text: Ticket cancellation, machine problems, access guidance.

highlight.title: Importance
highlight.text: It is an essential channel for agility and for the customer's perception of on-site support.

q1.text: Question: What is the main differentiator of personal service?

options.c: Agility and perception of on-site support

q1.feedback: Correct! Personal service is essential for agility and for the customer to feel immediate support.
